title: Search Continues for Missing Boater in Lake Wylie
summary: Dive operations are ongoing at Lake Wylie after a boater went missing. Officials are actively searching the area.

title: Mallard Creek Appeals Disqualification at State Track Meet

title: Senators Push for 'GAME' Act to Curb Child-Targeted Gambling Ads
summary: Senators are advocating for the 'GAME' Act to restrict gambling advertisements aimed at children on platforms like TikTok and Instagram.

title: Heat Wave Forecast with Multiple Days Above 90 Degrees
summary: A heat wave is expected, with temperatures exceeding 90 degrees for several days. Residents should take precautions.
